The System

How the Club Works

This is not exposure — it's allocation. Visibility is distributed intentionally. Your car leaves algorithm chaos and enters a system where reach is planned, saturation is capped, and placement is guaranteed every month.

01
Join a Tier

Pick the membership level that fits your goals. Each tier has a hard cap — keeping your slot rare and your competition limited by design.

02
Get Placed

DM us on Instagram after joining. We reply the same day, confirm your placement, and schedule your next feature date immediately.

03
Get Featured

Your Abarth is delivered to one of the largest dedicated audiences in the world — across Instagram and Facebook, every month, on schedule, without exception.

Membership Benefits

What You Get Inside

📍
Guaranteed Placement

Not a raffle. A confirmed slot in the content calendar — planned, scheduled, delivered to the audience every single month.

🏁
Contest Access

Every tier gets access to club contests backed by real reach. All members compete. The audience decides the winner.

🔒
Capped Membership

Hard limits on every tier mean your visibility is never diluted. Fewer members = more attention per car. That is the design.

⚡
Same-Day Response

DM us after joining. We reply the same day. No waiting room, no silence — your car enters the system immediately.
